notes: Excellent submission exceeding all requirements. Rules are clear, specific (PetalLength < 2.5 → setosa; PetalWidth < 1.7 → versicolor; else virginica), and achieve 96% accuracy (144/150), surpassing the 95% target. Feature analysis thoroughly compares all four features with per-species statistics, correctly identifying PetalLength/PetalWidth as discriminators and explaining separability. Evaluation includes complete per-rule accuracy, per-species accuracy table, properly formatted confusion matrix, and detailed misclassification analysis for all 6 errors with row indices and explanations. Report is well-organized into logical sections with professional markdown formatting, clear decision tree presentation, and intuitive flow. Setosa is perfectly classified (100%), all errors occur in versicolor/virginica boundary zone as expected. Minor note: duplicate markdown files created (not harmful). Work demonstrates strong data analysis methodology.
